topic: A barista preparing a traditional Turkish coffee using a cezve in hot sand.

parsed_generation.script:
[00:00-00:02] Shot 1: Barista places cezve in hot sand to begin heating for Turkish coffee - Camera: Wide, Framing: wide, Movement: static, Subject: Barista.
[00:02-00:05] Shot 2: Barista stirs the cezve in hot sand with a spoon, steam rising as foam begins - Camera: Close-up, Framing: close, Movement: static, Subject: Barista.
[00:05-00:08] Shot 3: Barista pours the finished coffee from the cezve into a demitasse cup, foam visible - Camera: Medium, Framing: medium, Movement: slow tracking, Subject: Barista.
parsed_generation.narration: Shot 1 shows a barista placing the cezve into hot sand to begin heating, establishing the traditional Turkish coffee method and the stable heat source. Shot 2 tightens on the barista’s hands as they stir the cezve in the hot sand, foam starting to form as the coffee warms, highlighting craftsmanship and patience with a single subject in focus. Shot 3 captures the pour from the cezve into a demitasse cup, foam cresting as the coffee finishes, signaling readiness and service. Together, the sequence conveys the exact topic: a barista preparing a traditional Turkish coffee using a cezve in hot sand.
